outreach_draft.subject: Gatekeeper Liability Recovery — Offshore Fraud Judgment — Bank & Underwriter Exposure
outreach_draft.body:
Dear Mr. Rizio-Hamilton,

I am reaching out regarding a gatekeeper liability recovery matter that may align with Bernstein Litowitz's work in underwriter and financial institution fraud recovery.

Our client holds a substantial uncollected fraud judgment against an offshore foreign corporation. Direct enforcement is not viable. The recovery strategy targets financial institution and underwriter gatekeepers — entities positioned to identify or prevent the fraud who failed to act. The preferred path is negotiated settlement using identified liability exposure as leverage.

Your firm's $3.3B recovery in the Viacom-Archegos matter, the $150M JPMorgan Chase recovery, and the $2.425B BankAmerica settlement reflect exactly the type of financial institution gatekeeper recovery model we are pursuing.

I would welcome a brief preliminary conversation. No commitment implied.

Sincerely,

Corporate X-Factor Operations
Judgment Monetization Group
corporatezfactor.com

optimizations_applied: Direct email found: johnr@blbglaw.com (was: firm website contact)
Added $2.425B BankAmerica citation — stronger precedent set
Rizio-Hamilton is Co-Head Securities Litigation — ideal contact confirmed
